overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a dark forest path at night. The character moves steadily through dense woodland with atmospheric blue-green lighting, passing stone walls, wooden fences, and approaching ancient ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark forest trail with stone retaining wall

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the forest path with swords strapped to his back, moving away from the camera

entered.detail: low stone wall running alongside the right side of the path
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest
tall dense pine and fir trees surrounding the path
large rock face visible through the trees on the left

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt trail through a dense forest at night. A stone retaining wall runs along the right side of the path while rocky outcrops are visible through the trees on the left. The scene is dark with blue-green atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with wooden split-rail fence

events.description: stone retaining wall transitions to wooden split-rail fence on the right side

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the path, passing a distinctive white-barked dead tree

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence made of horizontal logs replacing the stone wall
small dilapidated wooden structure visible behind the fence
tall dead tree with distinctive white bark standing near the fence

segments.scene_description: The path continues through the forest as the stone wall gives way to a wooden split-rail fence. An abandoned wooden hut is visible behind the fence, and a distinctive white-barked dead tree stands near the path. The atmosphere remains dark and atmospheric.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail approaching ancient stone ruins

events.description: ancient stone pillar ruins become visible in the distance ahead on the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt approaching the stone ruins, maintaining a steady walking pace

entered.detail: tall weathered stone pillar and wall ruins standing in the middle of the path ahead

segments.scene_description: As the wooden fence and abandoned structures fall behind, ancient stone ruins come into view ahead on the path. Geralt continues walking toward the weathered stone pillar that stands prominently in the trail, with the forest opening slightly around the ruins.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, nocturnal forest that transitions from a narrow woodland trail into an area of ancient ruins. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path flanked by a stone retaining wall and rocky outcrops under a dark, blue-green atmospheric glow. As the journey continues, the stone wall gives way to a wooden split-rail fence, passing an abandoned hut and a stark, white-barked dead tree. The scene then opens slightly as the wooden structures fall behind, shifting the focus toward weathered stone pillars emerging from the darkness. Finally, the camera follows the character as he approaches these ancient ruins standing prominently in the trail.
